name: discordrpc-spotify-realtime
description: Realtime Discord Rich Presence for the song currently playing on Spotify.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --watch" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 dist-electron/main.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
